mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STAGE_PREFER (MEMBER_NO, STAGE_NO, PREFER_TYPE) VALUES (#{memberNo}, #{stageNo}, #{preferType})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT R.REVIEW_NO, R.MEMBER_NO, M.MEMBER_EMAIL, R.REVIEW_CONTENT, R.REVIEW_WRITE_DATE, COUNT(RL.MEMBER_NO) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM REVIEWS R JOIN MEMBER M ON R.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN REVIEWS_LIKE RL ON R.REVIEW_NO = RL.REVIEWS_NO WHERE R.STAGE_NO = #{stageNo} AND R.REVIEW_DEL_FL = 'N' GROUP BY R.REVIEW_NO, R.MEMBER_NO, M.MEMBER_EMAIL, R.REVIEW_CONTENT, R.REVIEW_WRITE_DATE ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC, R.REVIEW_WRITE_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: MERGE INTO STAGE_CACHE sc USING DUAL ON (sc.STAGE_NO = #{stageNo}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET STAGE_TITLE = #{stageTitle}, STAGE_THUMBNAIL = #{stageThumbnail}, STAGE_PERIOD = #{stagePeriod}, STAGE_PLACE = #{stagePlace}, CACHED_AT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (STAGE_NO, STAGE_TYPE, STAGE_TITLE, STAGE_THUMBNAIL, STAGE_PERIOD, STAGE_PLACE) VALUES (#{stageNo}, #{stageType}, #{stageTitle}, #{stageThumbnail}, #{stagePeriod}, #{stagePlace})
mapper.select: SELECT STAGE_NO AS stageNo, STAGE_TYPE AS stageType, STAGE_TITLE AS stageTitle, STAGE_THUMBNAIL AS stageThumbnail, STAGE_PERIOD AS stagePeriod, STAGE_PLACE AS stagePlace, TO_CHAR(CACHED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS cachedAt FROM STAGE_CACHE WHERE STAGE_NO = #{stageNo}
